$comment: Vault-level settings for the Paperwik vault. This file holds user-specific overrides (auto-populated permission approvals, user-added hooks) and paperwik-registered Stop-style hooks that can't live in plugin.json per Claude Code bug #10412. The installer (install.ps1 step c4) merges the SubagentStart + SubagentStop stanzas below into whatever this file already contains at install time, preserving all other keys. Never overwrite this file wholesale — user permission entries accumulate here over time.
